BERA Balance Checker

Check your BERA token balances on Berachain network

Instructions

  • Enter one Ethereum-format address per line
  • Addresses must start with "0x" followed by 40 hexadecimal characters
  • You can check multiple addresses at once

Example: 0x742d35Cc6634C0532925a3b844Bc454e4438f44e

Made by 0x_ultra
